ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ct_scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CT scan */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the CT scan */,
  "dice_coefficient" REAL /* Dice coefficient for image similarity */,
  "thresholded_volume_mm" REAL /* Thresholded volume in cubic millimeters */,
  "thresholded_volume_gt_mm" REAL /* Ground truth thresholded volume in cubic millimeters */,
  "largest_hematoma_gt_mm" REAL /* Largest hematoma ground truth in cubic millimeters */,
  "largest_hematoma_pred_mm" REAL /* Largest hematoma prediction in cubic millimeters */,
  "severe_hematoma_gt" INTEGER /* Indicates if severe hematoma is present in ground truth */,
  "severe_hematoma_pred" INTEGER /* Indicates if severe hematoma is predicted */,
  "vox_dim_1_mm" REAL /* Voxel dimension 1 in millimeters */,
  "vox_dim_2_mm" REAL /* Voxel dimension 2 in millimeters */,
  "vox_dim_3_mm" REAL /* Voxel dimension 3 in millimeters */,
  "probability_volume_mm" REAL /* Probability volume in cubic millimeters */,
  "probability_volume_voxels" INTEGER /* Probability volume in voxels */,
  "thresholded_volume_voxels" INTEGER /* Thresholded volume in voxels */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date when the CT scan was performed */,
  "scanner_model" TEXT /* Model of the CT scanner used */,
  "scanner_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the CT scanner used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the scan */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date when the scan was performed */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Technician who performed the scan */,
  "scanner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CT scanner used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_sessions_scanner_id FOREIGN KEY ("scanner_id") REFERENCES ct_scanners ("scanner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ct_scanners" (
  "scanner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CT scanner */,
  "scanner_model" TEXT /* Model of the CT scanner */,
  "scanner_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the CT scanner */,
  "scanner_location" TEXT /* Location of the CT scanner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scanner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hematoma_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hematoma assessment */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CT scan assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medical professional who made the assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hematoma_assessments_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES ct_scans ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hematoma_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the treatment plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the treatment outcome */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the medical professional */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the medical professional */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the medical professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm version */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the algorithm version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm version */,
  "dice_coefficient" REAL /* Dice coefficient for image similarity */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the algorithm */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the algorithm */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the algorithm */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the algorithm */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient participating in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient withdrew from the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study finding */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "finding_date" TEXT /* Date when the finding was recorded */,
  "finding_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the study finding */,
  "finding_status" TEXT /* Status of the study finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_findings_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_platform" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the initiator of the collaboration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_platform_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_platform_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_share_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "institution1" TEXT /* Name of the first institution */,
  "institution2" TEXT /* Name of the second institution */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement was made */,
  "agreement_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
